content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a datasheet page for the MMBT3904L and SMMBT3904L transistors. It contains: - Title: MMBT3904L, SMMBT3904L - A table for "ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS" - A table for "OFF CHARACTERISTICS" - A table for "ON CHARACTERISTICS" - A table for "SMALL-SIGNAL CHARACTERISTICS" - A table for "SWITCHING CHARACTERISTICS" - A note about parametric performance. - Two figures showing delay and rise time, and storage and fall time. - Footer with website and feedback info. **2. Break down the content into JSON structure:** * **Title:** MMBT3904L, SMMBT3904L * **Table 1: ELECTRICAL CHARACTERISTICS** * Columns: Characteristic, Symbol, Min, Max, Unit * Rows: * OFF CHARACTERISTICS (header) * Collector – Emitter Breakdown Voltage ($I_C = 1.0$ mAdc, $I_B = 0$) | $V_{(BR)CEO}$ | 40 | – | Vdc * Collector – Base Breakdown Voltage ($I_C = 10$ $\mu$Adc, $I_E = 0$) | $V_{(BR)CBO}$ | 60 | – | Vdc * Emitter – Base Breakdown Voltage ($I_E = 10$ $\mu$Adc, $I_C = 0$) | $V_{(BR)EBO}$ | 6.0 | – | Vdc * Base Cutoff Current ($V_{CE} = 30$ Vdc, $V_{EB} = 3.0$ Vdc) | $I_{BL}$ | – | 50 | nAdc * Collector Cutoff Current ($V_{CE} = 30$ Vdc, $V_{EB} = 3.0$ Vdc) | $I_{CEX}$ | – | 50 | nAdc * **Table 2: ON CHARACTERISTICS** * Columns: Characteristic, Symbol, Min, Max, Unit * Rows: * DC Current Gain ($I_C = 0.1$ mAdc, $V_{CE} = 1.0$ Vdc) | $H_{FE}$ | 40 | – | – * ($I_C = 1.0$ mAdc, $V_{CE} = 1.0$ Vdc) | | 70 | – | * ($I_C = 10$ mAdc, $V_{CE} = 1.0$ Vdc) | | 100 | 300 | * ($I_C = 50$ mAdc, $V_{CE} = 1.0$ Vdc) | | 60 | – | * ($I_C = 100$ mAdc, $V_{CE} = 1.0$ Vdc) | | 30 | – | * Collector – Emitter Saturation Voltage ($I_C = 10$ mAdc, $I_B = 1.0$ mAdc) | $V_{CE(sat)}$ | – | 0.2 | Vdc * ($I_C = 50$ mAdc, $I_B = 5.0$ mAdc) | | – | 0.3 | * Base – Emitter Saturation Voltage ($I_C = 10$ mAdc, $I_B = 1.0$ mAdc) | $V_{BE(sat)}$ | 0.65 | 0.85 | Vdc * ($I_C = 50$ mAdc, $I_B = 5.0$ mAdc) | | – | 0.95 | * **Table 3: SMALL-SIGNAL CHARACTERISTICS** * Columns: Characteristic, Symbol, Min, Max, Unit * Rows: * Current – Gain – Bandwidth Product ($I_C = 10$ mAdc, $V_{CE} = 20$ Vdc, $f = 100$ MHz) | $f_T$ | 300 | – | MHz * Output Capacitance ($V_{CB} = 5.0$ Vdc, $I_E = 0$, $f = 1.0$ MHz) | $C_{obo}$ | – | 4.0 | pF * Input Capacitance ($V_{EB} = 0.5$ Vdc, $I_C = 0$, $f = 1.0$ MHz) | $C_{ibo}$ | – | 8.0 | pF * Input Impedance ($V_{CE} = 10$ Vdc, $I_C = 1.0$ mAdc, $f = 1.0$ kHz) | $h_{ie}$ | 1.0 | 10 | k$\Omega$ * Voltage Feedback Ratio ($V_{CE} = 10$ Vdc, $I_C = 1.0$ mAdc, $f = 1.0$ kHz) | $h_{re}$ | 0.5 | 8.0 | $X 10^{-4}$ * Small – Signal Current Gain ($V_{CE} = 10$ Vdc, $I_C = 1.0$ mAdc, $f = 1.0$ kHz) | $h_{fe}$ | 100 | 400 | – * Output Admittance ($V_{CE} = 10$ Vdc, $I_C = 1.0$ mAdc, $f = 1.0$ kHz) | $h_{oe}$ | 1.0 | 40 | $\mu$mhos * Noise Figure ($V_{CE} = 5.0$ Vdc, $I_C = 100$ $\mu$Adc, $R_S = 1.0$ k ohms, $f = 1.0$ kHz) | NF | – | 5.0 | dB * **Table 4: SWITCHING CHARACTERISTICS** * Columns: Characteristic, Symbol, Min, Max, Unit * Rows: * Delay Time | $t_d$ | – | 35 | ns * Rise Time | $t_r$ | – | 35 | * Storage Time | $t_s$ | – | 200 | ns * Fall Time | $t_f$ | – | 50 | * **Note:** Product parametric performance is indicated in the Electrical Characteristics for the listed test conditions, unless otherwise noted. Product performance may not be indicated by the Electrical Characteristics if operated under different conditions. * **Note 4:** Pulse Test: Pulse Width $\le 300$ $\mu$s, Duty Cycle $\le 2.0\%$. * **Figure 1:** Delay and Rise Time Equivalent Test Circuit * Shows a waveform and a circuit diagram. * **Figure 2:** Storage and Fall Time Equivalent Test Circuit * Shows a waveform and a circuit diagram. * **Footer:** www.onsemi.com, 2, Share Feedback Your Opinion Matters **3. Refine the JSON:** I will format the extracted data into a clean JSON structure.
